dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Does this phone work? I want to call Grandfather before we go to his house.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Yes, it works. But he's probably in the garden. You know he spends all his time there in summer.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: That's true. He really loves his plants. Do you think he'll let us help him today?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: I think so. He seemed tired yesterday when we visited. All that work is too much for him.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Should we take a light lunch with us? We'll probably be there till evening.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Good idea. Let me make some sandwiches. We can eat them in the garden.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Perfect. I'm ready to go. It's going to be a long day, but I'm interested in learning about his plants.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Look! What's that big animal in Grandfather's garden?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Oh no! That's a bull from the farm next door. It's eating everything!

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: This is really bad. Grandfather will be so upset. What do we do?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: I don't know. The bull seems angry. Look at it - it's pulling up the plants with its teeth.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Should we call the police? Or the farmer?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Let's call the farmer first. Do you have his phone number?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: No, but Grandfather does. Wait - the bull is charging forward! Get back!

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: That was close! We need to get help now. This is serious trouble.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: The farmer is here! He's going to take the bull back to his land.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Good. Look, he's using a rope to pull it away. The bull is going without much trouble now.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: But the garden... everything is destroyed. The plants, the flowers, everything.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: The farmer said he'll pay for the damage. He seemed really sorry about it.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: That will help. But Grandfather spent so much time working here. He'll be sad.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: I think we should help him plant a new garden. We can spend the summer working with him.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: That's a great idea! He'll like that. We can make it even better than before.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Yes. Eventually, it will be beautiful again. Let's go tell him our plan.
